visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with white lettering, located in the center-left of the shelf.
A gold-colored bottle with a green cap, to the left of the red soda can.
A white can with cartoon graphics, to the right of the red soda can.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind the red soda can.
A black soda can partially visible behind the gold coffee bottle.
A green can partially visible between the gold bottle and the red can.

action_plan.explanation: The user requested coca-cola, and the red soda can is directly accessible in the front.
